calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craig Hassler and Carla Allen for Sidney Oubre, Jr.

Ms. Allen stated that she has a receipt for the professional clean up fees, that part of the payment was advanced by her Client for which she has a copy of the cashier's check, that some was paid out of escrow and that the total cost was $11,924.43. Ms. Allen also stated that the property was originally appraised at $490,000.00, that it sold for $417,000.00, that there was a loss of $73,000.00 and that she has the final closing statement. Mr. Hallser spoke of the issues/process and time spent with regard to the move out of Ms. Oubre. The petition for final distribution was taken under submission. Ms. Allen was directed to file the above mentioned documents and provide an endorsed copy to the Clerk.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craig Hassler for Sidney Oubre, Jr.

Mr. Hassler stated that he was associated in as Counsel for the extensive real property issue, that Ms. Allen indicated that Ms. Oubre vacated the property and that the property was ultimately sold. Mr. Hassler also stated that Ms. Allen indicated that the remaining issues are that they are not sure of Ms. Oubre's location, that she is negotiating with prior Counsel regarding fees, extraordinary fees for him (Mr. Hassler), that there are random accounting items and that she is expecting to file the petition for final distribution with in 90-days. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report was continued to March 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Dec-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carla Allen aoppeared by telephone for Sidney Oubre, Jr.

Ms. Allen stated that they now have a new Probate Referee appointed, that they received a
re-appraisal for sale, that they cleaned out the house and that it is now in a condition for showing. In addition, Ms. Allen stated that they are ready to sign a listing agreement and that they had to get a writ issued to get the property vacated. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or report of status of administration was continued to December 16, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to advise the Court in advance of the hearing if more time is needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Continued To Jul-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Continued To Jun-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carla Allen (appearing by Court Call) for Sidney Oubre (Administrator)

Ms. Allen reported that the sister was removed from the house on April 3, 2013, that they now have access to the house, and that the house is in deplorable condition. Ms. Allen also stated that they have people interested in buying the house and that once the house is sold the estate can be closed. Status on Petition for Final Distribution was continued to June 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Continued To Apr-23-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Susan Oubre Vacating The Property
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craig Hassler for Petitioner. Susan Oubre in Propria Persona.

Ms. Oubre stated that she can not move in to her new place until September 7, 2012. The Court once again expressed concern about Ms. Oubre residing in the property with no utilities, and explained that the property needs to be sold and that the Estate needs to be brought to a close. The Court noted that partition and possession had been granted. Mr. Hassler will prepare a writ of possession with no stay of execution. Ms. Oubre was advised to file a change of address with the Court and to keep in touch with Mr. Hassler.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Susan Oubre Vacating The Property
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craig Hassler for Sidney Oubre, Jr. Susan Oubre in Propria Persona.

Ms. Oubre stated that she did not vacate the premises, that she is on four waiting lists and that a member of her Church guaranteed her a room in one month. Status on Susan Oubre vacating the property was continued to August 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Oubre that the house needs to be sold, that the money has to be divided between Ms. Oubre and her Brother, that she has one last chance to make the move, that she has to be out of the property by that date (August 28, 2012) and then decide what to do with the furniture.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Susan Oubre Vacating The Property

Status on vacating the property was continued to August 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Ms. Oubre time to obtain Counsel. The Court advised Ms. Oubre that July 31, 2012 is still the move out date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

Petition Of Administrator For Order Of Partition Of Real Property In Estate; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Sidney J. Oubre, Jr. In Support Thereof (Cal. Prob. Code Sections 11950 Et Seq & 850 Et Seq)
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craig Hassler for Sidney Oubre, Jr. Susan Oubre in Propria Persona.

Ms. Oubre agreed to vacate the property by the end of July 2012. Mr. Hallser will assist with providing Ms. Oubre with information concerning services that may be available to her. Status on close of the Estate was approved and extended to February 19, 2013. The Petition for Order of Partition of Real Property was taken under submission. Status on Susan Oubre vacating the property was set for June 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and for July 31, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To May-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean Miller for Sidney Oubre, Jr.

Mr. Miller stated that Adult Protective Services (APS) has not been involved with his Client's Sister's circumstances, that his Client was recovering from an injury, that the property was in distress and that his Client instructed him not to do anything further. The Court stated that the Estate needed to be closed by distributing it or selling the house, that APS needs to be involved and expressed concern about the Sister. The matter was continued to May 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Miller will speak with his Client.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
